nodes.name: AML-Large-LI-Multi-PNA.yaml
nodes.summary: Experiment configuration for AML Large-LI hetero-edge classification with multi-layer PNA under HomoGNNEdgeModel. It enables ports=True, reverse_mp=True, ego ids while using weighted cross entropy [1, 7].
